name: multistation

metrics.experiment: multi-station (haro_strait stream + cached OrcaHello index for 3 nodes); Wave 2 integration: effort/log E wired (modeling.effort), time-rescaling re-scored with burst-dedup, cross-station scored with coarser bins + split-half ceiling

level1_cross_station.scoring: coarser PSTH (12 bins, min per-bin count 1) with within-station split-half reliability as the ceiling and partial-pooling reported with its inflation caveat (agent C)

partial_pooling_shrinkage.caveat: shrinkage toward a shared target mechanically inflates cross-station correlation; not evidence of agreement, read against the split-half ceiling

diel.verdict: below bar, but within-station split-half reliability is ALSO below 0.5: the PSTH is too noisy to reproduce within a single station -> sparse-count / small-sample artifact, not demonstrated heterogeneity

partial_pooling_shrinkage.caveat: shrinkage toward a shared target mechanically inflates cross-station correlation; not evidence of agreement, read against the split-half ceiling

tide.verdict: below bar, but within-station split-half reliability is ALSO below 0.5: the PSTH is too noisy to reproduce within a single station -> sparse-count / small-sample artifact, not demonstrated heterogeneity

partial_pooling_shrinkage.caveat: shrinkage toward a shared target mechanically inflates cross-station correlation; not evidence of agreement, read against the split-half ceiling

lunar.verdict: below bar while within-station split-half clears it and coverage is comparable -> consistent with GENUINE station heterogeneity (model with a station random effect)

partial_pooling_shrinkage.caveat: shrinkage toward a shared target mechanically inflates cross-station correlation; not evidence of agreement, read against the split-half ceiling

season.verdict: per-station phase coverage differs (stations span different parts of the cycle), so the cross-station correlation is over the shared window only -> observation-window confound, NOT demonstrated full-cycle consistency (mean corr=0.7017 is not creditable)

metrics.time_rescaling_verdict_reason: detection burstiness/clustering: a smooth conditional intensity cannot reproduce within-encounter inter-event intervals (event-level KS p=0; a constant-rate Poisson fails identically per Wave 1 diagnostic), and the burst-deduped encounter-onset process still does not clear Exp(1) on the current data. Time-rescaling is WITHHELD with the clustering reason rather than tuned to pass (B.3); bin-level calibration is gated separately by the held-out NB PIT.

time_rescaling_encounter_level.method: burst-dedup to encounter onsets (IEI > 1.00 h) + per-station level renormalisation; isolates encounter timing from detection-count level

metrics.provenance: EXPERIMENT: not the production fit; mixes the production haro_strait stream with the cached OrcaHello index for the other nodes; write_outputs=False, S3 upload disabled; no store write; no confidence promotion.

reason: Level 2 still not met with multi-station data: held-out skill 0.07779744481420332 (single-station baseline -0.04730031489935951, beats climatology=True); time-rescaling withheld (event-level KS p=0.0, encounter-level KS p=7.464361732396692e-22); cross-station NOT consistent (4 stations; noise-bound=['diel', 'tide'], coverage-confounded=['season']). Effective confidence unchanged at 0% (honest, experiment unpromoted: write_outputs=False, no supervisor decision). Held-out skill is positive, but time-rescaling is withheld on the clustered detection stream and cross-station kernel consistency is bounded by per-station sample size (both need the 3-node production ingest).
